summary: Trump's ceasefire extension has taken some pressure off risk assets, though crude remains elevated and Iran-U.S. talks appear to be on ice. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 notched fresh all-time highs this week even as market breadth moved lower, suggesting mega-cap tech has been the main driver of the rally.
tweet: Iran ceasefire extended but fragile, while an earnings-driven mega-cap surge pushes stocks to all-time highs even as breadth stays thin and gold fades.
